scripts.pipeline:sync: node -e "Promise.all([import('./lib/pipeline/SyncEngine.js'),import('./lib/pipeline/TMDBProvider.js'),import('./lib/pipeline/ProductHuntProvider.js'),import('./lib/pipeline/BooksProvider.js')]).then(async([s,t,p,b])=>{const e=new s.SyncEngine({skipAI:true});const r1=await e.syncProvider(new t.TMDBProvider({limit:20}));const r2=await e.syncProvider(new p.ProductHuntProvider({limit:20}));const r3=await e.syncProvider(new b.BooksProvider({limit:10,subjectsPerRun:3}));console.log('Done',JSON.stringify([r1,r2,r3],null,2))})"
